summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of BrandsPage.js V2 Precision Craft redesign. Tested across 3 viewports (mobile 390px, tablet 768px, desktop 1920px). 51 test cases executed - 48 PASSED, 3 minor selector issues (not code bugs). All 16 requirements from the redesign verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: PC design tokens correctly implemented: navy #0D1B2A, navyMid #1A2F45, accent #FF5722, borderRadius 4px
Helmet replaced with useEffect DOM injection - meta, og:title, canonical, and 4 schema scripts all inject to head correctly
Hero section: dark gradient background, 4 trust badges (Licensed, Same/Next, 180-Day, OEM), orange CALL button, outlined BOOK button
Brand grid: responsive 2-col mobile / 3-col tablet / 4-col desktop, navyMid cards, inverted white logos (filter: brightness(0) invert(1)), logo fallback to text on error
Sticky tabs at top:0 with orange active tab, inactive tabs white08 background
Brand tiers section: auto-fit grid, navy cards with 3px accent left border
FAQ: navyMid cards, + toggle with rotate(45deg) on open, faq-answer class with 2px accent left border
Carousel: 1 card mobile / 3 cards desktop, navy cards, orange VIEW SERVICE button, navyMid arrow backgrounds
Final CTA: navy background with 3px accent border-top, outlined book button (not orange bg)
Mobile sticky bar: navyMid bg, 2px accent border-top, CALL orange, BOOK navy with Same-Day micro-label, TEXT outlined
CSS-based responsive visibility: .brands-float-btn hidden on mobile/shown on desktop, .brands-mobile-bar shown on mobile/hidden on tablet+
Footer: responsive column layout on mobile

success_rate.frontend: 94% (48/51 tests passed - 3 selector issues, not code bugs)

context_for_next_testing_agent: BrandsPage.js V2 Precision Craft redesign fully tested. All 16 design requirements verified: PC design tokens, useEffect meta injection, dark theme on all sections, responsive grid (2/3/4 cols), logo inversion filter, brand tiers auto-fit grid, FAQ toggle rotate, responsive carousel (1/3 cards), mobile sticky bar with Same-Day label, CSS visibility rules for floating button/mobile bar. Tests executed at /brands route.
